hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"A pull request was just created via the GitHub MCP. Per this project PR-review autofix policy (CLAUDE.md): (1) immediately call subscribe_pr_activity for the new PR number so its Codex/Copilot review and CI events wake this session; (2) on each review event, judge each comment validity against the code, then auto-apply confident small in-scope fixes by commit and push to the PR branch, ask the user via AskUserQuestion if a comment is ambiguous or architecturally significant, and skip silently if no action is needed; (3) keep watching until the PR is merged or closed. Do not poll with sleep; rely on webhook events."}}'
